summary:
Fixed the type-coercion bug that made rating filtering treat the query value as a string.

Changes made
1. utils.js  
   • Convert min_rating query string to a Number and store only if it’s a valid number.

2. filter.js  
   • Simplified rating filter: compare product.rating ≥ numeric minRating (no string inclusion logic).

Result  
Running test.sh now passes:

PASS: Rating filter returns correct results
